$comment: Static chain manifest for the multi-chain USDT tip indexer (F10, ADR-009). Each entry is overridable via env: CHAIN_<chainId>_RPC_URLS (comma-separated), CHAIN_<chainId>_ENABLED (true|false), CHAIN_<chainId>_USDT (0x...). At least one chain must be enabled at boot; Sepolia is the demo default per spec.

chains.name: Sepolia
chains.notes: Hackathon demo chain. Uses Circle USDC on Sepolia (FiatTokenV2 proxy 0x1c7D4B196Cb0C7B01d743Fbc6116a902379C7238) because Tether's Sepolia USDT deployment 0xd077a400968890eacc75cdc901f0356c943e4fdb does NOT implement EIP-3009. Domain (name/version) is fetched from-chain by src/lib/evm/eip3009.ts, so the code is token-agnostic; UI still labels this as 'USDT' for demo copy. Both tokens share 6 decimals.

chains.name: Plasma Testnet
chains.notes: Plasma testnet USDT0 contract in development as of 2026-07-06 per docs.plasma.org. Flip enabled to true and set usdt0Address when the contract publishes. Chain id verified 9746 (NOT 9745) at docs.plasma.org/docs/guides/network-configuration/testnet-details.md. Use env CHAIN_9746_USDT and CHAIN_9746_ENABLED to activate. ERC-4337 on Plasma is provided by Gelato / Thirdweb / ZeroDev (NOT Candide); tipping flow defaults to Sepolia.
